---
name: algoritmus
description: "Explains algorithm and its efficiency"
model: Claude Sonnet 4.5
agent: 'ask'
---

Analyze the algorithm in the selected code:

1. How the algorithm works, briefly step by step
2. What is its time complexity O(n)
3. What is its space complexity

Provide an overall efficiency assessment of the algorithm based on the information found. Do not consider other aspects when evaluating efficiency.

Mark problems with emoji according to severity (⚠️, ❗). Mark what is correct with ✅. Add recommendations with 💡.

Explain in an understandable way with concrete examples.

If there is no algorithm in the selected code to analyze, respond briefly: "There is no algorithm to analyze in the given code."
